name: Eswatini
avoid: October-April is warmer and wetter, so Sibebe trails get slippery and game drives are less comfortable than in the May-September dry season.
Kombis are cheap and useful between Mbabane, Lobamba, and Manzini, but services thin out early in the evening and on Sundays.
Keep some cash for park gates, community trail fees, and smaller taxis because cards are not always reliable outside larger hotels.
stopoverNote: If you only have 4 days, stay in Ezulwini Valley for Mlilwane and Mantenga day trips, do Sibebe Rock from Mbabane, and keep one final night inside Hlane Royal National Park.

cities.name: Mbabane
cities.notes: Eswatini's cooler highland capital is the best base for Sibebe Rock, craft stops like Ngwenya Glass, and easy kombi links into the Ezulwini Valley.

cities.name: Manzini
cities.notes: The country's commercial hub is practical for the big market, intercity kombis, casual food stops, and quick access to Matsapha and nearby craft centres.

cities.name: Ezulwini Valley
cities.notes: This green valley around Lobamba is Eswatini's classic culture-and-nature base for Mlilwane Wildlife Sanctuary, Mantenga Cultural Village, and House on Fire.

cities.name: Hlane Royal National Park
cities.notes: Hlane is Big Game Parks' easiest safari reserve for rhino, elephant, lion, and excellent birding, best reached by rental car or arranged transfer from central Eswatini.

itinerary.sim: MTN Eswatini or Eswatini Mobile prepaid SIMs are the easiest local options; budget about ₹460–₹920 for a starter data bundle and download offline maps before heading to Hlane.

Mbabane.name: Mbabane
Mbabane.note: Use Mbabane for the capital's cooler weather, Sibebe logistics, and one easy first night before shifting south-east toward the valley.

days.theme: Highland arrival, easy city reset, and a first taste of Mbabane

activities.name: King Mswati III International Airport to Mbabane by taxi
activities.tip: The cheaper budget option is usually airport shuttle or kombi via Manzini, but a direct taxi is easiest with bags.

activities.name: Mbabane Market walk and first currency exchange stop
Ngwenya Glass workshop visit
activities.tip: Watching the recycled-glass blowing is normally free; budget extra only if you shop in the craft store.

activities.name: Short taxi hops around Mbabane
Sunset stop at Sibebe Rock Spur or nearby viewpoints

days.theme: Sibebe Rock hike and one deeper day around the capital

activities.name: Taxi from Mbabane to Sibebe Trails trailhead
Sibebe Trails community hiking fee
activities.tip: Recent hikers usually report community fees of E30-E50 per person, with the amount varying slightly by route and local collection point.

activities.name: Optional local guide for Sibebe Rock
activities.tip: Community guides are typically about E100 for a half-day hike and help if you want the cave and waterfall detours.

activities.name: Ngwenya Mine viewpoint or extra capital coffee stop
Return taxi into Mbabane

Ezulwini Valley.name: Ezulwini Valley
Ezulwini Valley.note: This is the most efficient base for Eswatini's culture circuit, wildlife sanctuary, and evening venues without changing hotels constantly.

days.theme: Lobamba culture, Mantenga stories, and an easy valley afternoon

activities.name: Mbabane to Ezulwini by kombi or taxi
activities.tip: Kombis are the cheapest option on the Mbabane-Lobamba-Ezulwini corridor; taxis are faster if you are carrying luggage.

activities.name: Mantenga Cultural Village and Mantenga Falls admission
activities.tip: Recent sources commonly quote E100-E150 for adults depending on what is bundled with the dance performance and reserve access.

activities.name: Lobamba Parliament and royal precinct photo stop
House on Fire grounds visit
activities.tip: Entry is usually free unless you time your visit with a ticketed festival, concert, or special event.

activities.name: Short valley taxi rides between Lobamba, Mantenga, and hotel

days.theme: Mlilwane wildlife day with walking trails and a slower valley evening

activities.name: Mlilwane Wildlife Sanctuary conservation fee
activities.tip: The recent Big Game Parks adult day rate is about E85/ZAR 85, which converts to roughly ₹390 at the working rate used for this planner.

activities.name: Self-guided walking trails and Hippo Haunt area inside Mlilwane
Optional mountain bike hire or horse trail inside Mlilwane
Taxi or self-drive transfer between Ezulwini and Mlilwane gate
Evening spa or casino time back in the valley

Manzini.name: Manzini
Manzini.note: Keep Manzini short and practical: it works best as a market-and-craft stop before you continue to eastern Eswatini or loop back to the airport.

days.theme: Markets, craft shopping, and the commercial pulse of central Eswatini

activities.name: Ezulwini to Manzini by kombi or taxi
Manzini Market browsing and street-snack stop
Swazi Candles Craft Centre detour
activities.tip: There is no formal entry fee for the craft centre; budget only for purchases or a taxi if you are not self-driving.

activities.name: Taxi between market, Matsapha side stops, and hotel
Optional rental car pickup for the Hlane run next day

Hlane Royal National Park.name: Hlane Royal National Park
Hlane Royal National Park.note: Stay at least one night inside the park if you can; dawn and dusk around the waterhole are the whole point of Hlane.

days.theme: Transfer east, check into camp, and catch the first wildlife-heavy evening

activities.name: Manzini to Hlane by rental car or private taxi
activities.tip: Public transport is possible via Simunye plus a last taxi, but the reserve is much easier with your own car or a pre-arranged lodge transfer.

activities.name: Hlane Royal National Park conservation fee
activities.tip: Recent rack rates are usually around E85-E95 per adult per day, depending on the current gate tariff.

activities.name: Waterhole hide session at Ndlovu Camp
Guided sunset game drive
Campfire evening at Ndlovu or Bhubesi

days.theme: Rhino country, sunrise birding, and one more slow safari day

activities.name: Second-day Hlane conservation fee
Guided morning game drive or rhino-focused drive
Self-drive wildlife loops if you rented a car
Bird hide or vulture restaurant viewing area
Check-out transfer toward Manzini or the airport

connections.method: Kombi via Lobamba or direct taxi
Kombi down the MR103 or short taxi ride
Rental car, pre-arranged transfer, or kombi to Simunye plus taxi

extras: Dry-season mornings can be genuinely chilly in Mbabane and at Hlane, so pack a fleece for sunrise drives and Sibebe starts.
Ezulwini and Lobamba are the easiest places to combine culture with wildlife without long travel days.
If you are self-driving from South Africa, Eswatini pairs very naturally with Kruger or northern KwaZulu-Natal.
